description_long: This is a military-style, single-seat airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme. The wings are mid-mounted and slightly swept back, with two jet engines mounted under each wing. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. Distinctive markings, including a white cross and a yellow band, are visible on the rear fuselage.
description: A camouflaged, single-seat military jet airplane with mid-mounted swept wings, underwing engines, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the camouflage pattern, single vertical stabilizer, and the white cross marking on the rear fuselage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin underwing jet engines, tricycle landing gear, and the streamlined nose.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same camouflage and markings, with the landing gear and tail clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the tail structure, horizontal stabilizers, and the alignment of the engines under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with slightly swept wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
